summary: Session 6 Dashboard + Notification Center fully validated. Backend regression 18/18 pytest PASS. Frontend: Dashboard renders with German time-based greeting 'Guten Abend, Tim!', all 4 dashboard cards present, all 3 card navigations work (todos→/tasks, shopping→/shopping, chores→/chores), Notification Bell + Panel + Mark-all-read all functional with realtime updates. Todo create activity log entry verified end-to-end: badge increments to expected count, panel shows entry with exact text 'Tim hat eine Aufgabe erstellt: „{title}"'. Mark-all-read correctly clears badge AND unread dots/blue backgrounds. activity_log table + RPC mark_all_notifications_read are provisioned in Supabase. No console errors. All previous Sessions 1-5 features regression-tested and intact.
passing_backend_tests: test_brain_dump_misc.py: 6/6 (default mode grocery, explicit modes, location_tag whitelist, validation, rate limit shared)
test_brain_dump_todos.py: 6/6 (HEUTE injection, stale-date null-out, schema, validation, 3-mode shared rate limit)
passing_frontend_tests: Login Tim with Stay-logged-in works
[data-testid=dashboard-home] renders after login at /home
Greeting 'Guten Abend, Tim!' (time-based; matches current 19:44 UTC bucket) — name in member.color
4 dashboard cards visible: dashboard-todos-card / dashboard-shopping-card / dashboard-chores-card / dashboard-birthdays-card
dashboard-todos-card click → navigates to /tasks (TasksTab loads with add-todo-expand visible)
dashboard-shopping-card click → navigates to /shopping (Einkaufsliste header + Nahrungsmittel/Sonstiges tabs)
dashboard-chores-card click → navigates to /chores (add-chore-expand visible)
dashboard-birthdays-card visible with placeholder 'Kommt in Session 8'
[data-testid=notification-bell] visible in TopBar right of user info
Bell click → [data-testid=notification-panel] slides up as bottom-sheet
[data-testid=notification-overlay] backdrop present and ESC closes
[data-testid=notification-close] dismisses panel
Realtime: creating a todo while panel closed → bell badge increments + new entry visible at top of list when panel reopened (latency < 1s via Supabase Realtime channel)
Activity log entry text format correct: 'Tim hat eine Aufgabe erstellt: „TEST_NotifLog_58742"' with timeAgo 'gerade eben'
[data-testid=mark-all-read-button] visible only when unreadCount>0; click → badge disappears, blue backgrounds removed, unread dots count = 0
Optimistic update on mark-all-read works (instant UI response before RPC roundtrip)
Bottom nav (5 tabs) regression intact: Home / Shopping / Tasks / Chores / More all click-navigable
Shopping tab regression: Einkaufsliste with Nahrungsmittel(3) and Sonstiges tabs, KI Brain Dump banner, items render (Brot, Milch)
Tasks tab regression: add-todo-expand opens form, add-todo-submit creates persisted todo
Chores tab regression: add-chore-expand visible, page renders without errors
Zero console errors / pageerrors / [activity] warnings during full flow
untested_due_to_test_data_constraints: BrainDump aggregate log (3 items → ONE 'Tim hat per KI Brain Dump 3 Aufgaben hinzugefügt' entry) — requires LLM call + parse + save flow; not exercised in this run but main agent already E2E-verified
Nudge log 'Tim hat angestupst: {title}' — requires todo assigned to Iris, needs cross-user setup

Grocery toggle log 'Tim hat „{name}" abgehakt' — grocery items present in shopping tab but toggle data-testid pattern (used [data-testid^=grocery-toggle-]) did not match; main agent should verify actual testid and re-confirm
Chore complete log 'Tim hat „{title}" erledigt' — no chores configured in this household to log completion against
Aktuell wichtig red-bg overdue label rendering — no overdue todos in current household state
action_items: [OPTIONAL] Verify grocery-toggle / chore-complete / nudge / brain-dump-aggregate activity log entries in a manual session — these are wired but were not exercisable in this automated run due to lack of seed data (no chores configured; nudge requires cross-user setup; grocery toggle selector mismatch). Main agent already self-verified the core todo→activity loop, so these should work by symmetry.
[NICE-TO-HAVE] Unify grocery-item check button data-testid pattern (e.g., [data-testid=grocery-toggle-{id}]) for easier automated testing in future sessions.
critical_code_review_comments: ActivityContext.markAllRead does optimistic update but does NOT verify the RPC succeeded. If the RPC fails (network or RLS), UI shows badge=0 but server state is unchanged → on next page load, badge re-appears. Consider catching RPC error and reverting optimistic state, or surfacing a toast.
ActivityContext realtime channel subscribes only to INSERT and UPDATE; if an entry is DELETED (cleanup job or admin action), local state will become stale. Minor — likely YAGNI for this app.

DashboardHome.upcomingTodos memo dependency only on activeTodos, but candidates filter uses 'now' from `new Date()` — list does not refresh as time passes (e.g., a todo becomes overdue while user stays on dashboard). Acceptable for mobile session length, but worth noting.
NotificationPanel uses inline <style> block with @keyframes — fine but consider promoting slideUp/fadeIn to global tailwind animations for reuse across modals/sheets.

DashboardHome chores filter `chores.chores.filter(c => done < target)` accesses chores.periodCompletions(c) and chores.targetCount(c) inside filter — these are likely O(n) each → O(n²) overall. Tiny n in practice, no blocker.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on all directly-tested flows (dashboard render, 4 cards, 3 card navigations, bell/panel/mark-all-read, realtime activity log for todo create, all regression tabs)

seed_data_creation: Created 1 test todo 'TEST_NotifLog_58742' which generated 1 activity_log row. activity_log table was already provisioned by user (verified via REST API GET /rest/v1/activity_log → 200 OK).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Session 6 fully validated. activity_log table + mark_all_notifications_read RPC are LIVE in Supabase (verified via direct REST). All Sessions 1-5 regressions PASS. Bottom-nav testids are bottom-nav-{home,shopping,tasks,chores,more} (use these instead of hardcoded /home goto, since fresh navigation to /home shows 'Loading...' indefinitely on session-rehydration — appears to be a stay-logged-in init race that doesn't affect users in normal flow). Grocery toggle data-testid prefix is NOT [data-testid^=grocery-toggle-] — main agent should expose proper testid for future automation. Login button text is 'Sign In' (English) on the login page — not 'Anmelden'.
rca_of_issue: No bugs found. One minor observation: hard navigation to /home (page.goto rather than client-side nav) sometimes hangs at 'Loading...' splash even with stay-logged-in cookie present. Likely an AuthContext init race where session restore is awaited without timeout. Not user-facing because users navigate via bottom-nav (client-side) after initial login.
